metric_definitions.wing_mode: Butterfly geometry mode used by the backtest or runner: symmetric, broken_upper, broken_lower, or adaptive.
metric_definitions.broken_wing_extra_width: Extra width added to the broken side when wing_mode is asymmetric.
metric_definitions.total_return: Backward-compatible alias for net_modeled_pnl; equals final total_equity from the modeled equity curve and is not normalized by capital.
metric_definitions.stress_profile: Named simplified-pricer stress profile used for the run.
metric_definitions.stress_entry_debit_multiplier: Multiplier applied to simplified entry debit before entry friction.
metric_definitions.stress_peak_value_multiplier: Multiplier applied to the simplified peak-value assumption used by mark_to_model.
metric_definitions.stress_residual_floor_multiplier: Multiplier applied to the simplified residual floor used by mark_to_model.
metric_definitions.stress_slippage_multiplier: Multiplier applied to modeled slippage inside friction_per_layer.
metric_definitions.stress_close_value_haircut_pct: Additional percentage haircut applied to close_value after modeled friction.
metric_definitions.model_points: Final net modeled equity in model points; computed as equity_curve.total_equity[-1].
metric_definitions.gross_modeled_pnl: Final modeled equity before modeled friction; computed as equity_curve.gross_total_equity[-1].
metric_definitions.net_modeled_pnl: Final modeled equity after modeled friction; computed as equity_curve.total_equity[-1].
metric_definitions.per_contract_slippage: Modeled per-contract slippage in option points applied to each open/close action.
metric_definitions.gross_profit: Alias of gross_dollar_pnl for quick gross-vs-net comparison in dollars.
metric_definitions.net_slippage_adjusted_profit: Alias of net_dollar_pnl after modeled commission and slippage adjustments in dollars.
metric_definitions.friction_adjustment_dollars: gross_dollar_pnl - net_dollar_pnl; total modeled commission/slippage drag in dollars.
metric_definitions.max_gross_deployment_dollars: Peak gross modeled deployment dollars at the conservative execution-time peak before adding close-side friction reserve.
metric_definitions.max_modeled_state_capital_at_risk: Peak stable-state modeled entry cost from equity_curve.modeled_capital_at_risk; excludes intra-timestamp overlap.
metric_definitions.max_modeled_execution_capital_at_risk: Conservative execution-time peak modeled entry cost assuming opens can consume capital before same-timestamp closes release it.
metric_definitions.max_modeled_close_friction_reserve: Additional modeled reserve for one close-side friction charge per open layer at the conservative execution peak.
metric_definitions.max_modeled_capital_at_risk: Conservative modeled risk proxy = max_modeled_execution_capital_at_risk + max_modeled_close_friction_reserve.
metric_definitions.return_on_max_risk: net_dollar_pnl / max_modeled_capital_at_risk_dollars using the conservative modeled risk proxy denominator.
metric_definitions.worst_day_pnl_dollars: Minimum daily net modeled PnL in dollars; computed from grouped day_pnl * option_multiplier * contracts_per_layer.
metric_definitions.best_day_pnl_dollars: Maximum daily net modeled PnL in dollars; computed from grouped day_pnl * option_multiplier * contracts_per_layer.
metric_definitions.profit_factor_by_day: Gross positive daily modeled PnL divided by absolute gross negative daily modeled PnL.
metric_definitions.closed_layers: Count of close actions with realized_pnl metadata.
metric_definitions.gross_winners_dollars: Sum of positive closed-layer realized_pnl values converted to dollars.
metric_definitions.gross_losers_dollars: Absolute sum of negative closed-layer realized_pnl values converted to dollars.
metric_definitions.paper_spread_gate_enabled: Whether a paper-calibrated spread execution gate was applied to modeled entries in the backtest.
metric_definitions.paper_spread_gate_mode: How paper diagnostics are applied in the backtest: tax adds extra friction, hard_reject skips entries.
metric_definitions.paper_spread_gate_source: Source JSON used to calibrate the paper spread execution gate.
metric_definitions.paper_spread_gate_spread_ratio: Median spread_ratio from sampled paper candidates rejected for spread_too_wide.
metric_definitions.paper_spread_gate_total_spread: Median total_spread from sampled paper candidates rejected for spread_too_wide.
metric_definitions.paper_spread_gate_sample_count: Count of sampled spread_too_wide paper candidates used for the execution gate calibration.
metric_definitions.paper_spread_gate_rejection_count: Reported spread_too_wide rejection count from the paper diagnostics source.
metric_definitions.paper_spread_penalty_per_side: Additional modeled per-side spread penalty in option points when paper diagnostics mode is tax.
metric_definitions.paper_spread_penalty_round_trip: Additional modeled round-trip spread penalty in option points when paper diagnostics mode is tax.
metric_definitions.paper_spread_penalty_dollars: Total paper-calibrated spread penalty dollars applied across entry and close actions in the run.
metric_definitions.execution_filtered_entries: Count of modeled entries skipped by the paper-calibrated spread gate.
metric_definitions.execution_filtered_primary_entries: Count of primary-layer modeled entries skipped by the paper-calibrated spread gate.
metric_definitions.execution_filtered_supplementals: Count of supplemental modeled entries skipped by the paper-calibrated spread gate.
metric_definitions.win_rate_by_closed_layer: winning_layers / closed_layers using realized_pnl > 0 as a winner.
metric_definitions.average_closed_layer_pnl: Mean realized_pnl across all closed layers.
metric_definitions.average_winner_pnl: Mean realized_pnl across closed layers with realized_pnl > 0.
metric_definitions.average_loser_pnl: Mean realized_pnl across closed layers with realized_pnl < 0.
metric_definitions.profit_factor_by_closed_layer: Gross winners divided by absolute gross losers using closed-layer realized_pnl values.
